member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.DatabaseReader
member.summary: Instances of this class provide a reader for the GeoIP2 database format

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.DatabaseReader.#ctor(System.String,MaxMind.Db.FileAccessMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The mode by which to access the DB file.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.DatabaseReader.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},MaxMind.Db.FileAccessMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of locale codes to use in name property from most preferred to least preferred.
The mode by which to access the DB file.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.DatabaseReader.#ctor(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A stream of the MaxMind DB file.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.DatabaseReader.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A stream of the MaxMind DB file.
List of locale codes to use in name property from most preferred to least preferred.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.DatabaseReader.Metadata
member.summary: The metadata for the open MaxMind DB file.

member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AddressNotFoundException
member.summary: This exception is thrown when the IP address is not found in the database. This generally means that the address was a private or reserved address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AddressNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message explaining the cause of the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AddressNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message explaining the cause of the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AddressNotFoundException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AuthenticationException
member.summary: This exception is thrown when there is an authentication error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AuthenticationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message explaining the cause of the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AuthenticationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message explaining the cause of the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.AuthenticationException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.GeoIP2Exception
member.summary: This class represents a generic GeoIP2 error. All other exceptions thrown by the GeoIP2 API subclass this exception

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.GeoIP2Exception.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.GeoIP2Exception.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.GeoIP2Exception.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException
member.summary: This class represents an HTTP transport error. This is not an error returned by the web service itself. As such, it is a IOException instead of a GeoIP2Exception.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException.#ctor(System.String,System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Uri)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message describing the reason why the exception was thrown.
The HTTP status of the response that caused the exception.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException.#ctor(System.String,System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.Uri,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message describing the reason why the exception was thrown.
The HTTP status of the response that caused the exception.
The underlying exception that caused this one.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException.GetObjectData(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Method to serialize data.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException.HttpStatus
member.summary: The HTTP status code returned by the web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.HttpException.Uri
member.summary: The URI queried by the web service.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.InvalidRequestException
member.summary: This class represents a non-specific error returned by MaxMind's GeoIP2 web service. This occurs when the web service is up and responding to requests, but the request sent was invalid in some way.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.InvalidRequestException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Uri)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message explaining the cause of the error.
The error code returned by the web service.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.InvalidRequestException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.InvalidRequestException.GetObjectData(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Method to serialize data.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.InvalidRequestException.Code
member.summary: The error code returned by the web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.InvalidRequestException.Uri
member.summary: The URI queried by the web service.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.OutOfQueriesException
member.summary: This exception is thrown when your account does not have any queries remaining for the called service.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.OutOfQueriesException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.OutOfQueriesException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A message explaining the cause of the error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.OutOfQueriesException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.PermissionRequiredException
member.summary: This class represents an authentication error.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.PermissionRequiredException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.PermissionRequiredException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The underlying exception that caused this one.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Exceptions.PermissionRequiredException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Constructor for deserialization.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Http.Client
member.summary: This abstraction existed so that we could support both HttpClient and WebRequest. After we drop .NET Standard 2.1 support, we should get rid of this abstraction. Doing so will likely help us reduce unnecessary allocations.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient
member.summary: Interface for web-service client

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.Country
member.summary: Returns an for the requesting IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.City
member.summary: Returns an for the requesting IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.Insights(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an for the specified IP address.

member.summary: Returns an for the requesting IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.CountryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 Country web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Country response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.CountryAsync(System.Net.IPAddress)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 Country web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Country response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.CountryAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 Country web service for the requesting IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Country response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.CityAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 City Plus web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the City Plus response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.CityAsync(System.Net.IPAddress)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 City Plus web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the City Plus response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.CityAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 City Plus web service for the requesting IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the City Plus response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.InsightsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 Insights web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Insights response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.InsightsAsync(System.Net.IPAddress)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 Insights web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Insights response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.IGeoIP2WebServicesClient.InsightsAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously query the GeoIP2 Insights web service for the requesting IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Insights response

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer
member.summary: Contains anonymizer-related data associated with an IP address. This data is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.Confidence
member.summary: A score ranging from 1 to 99 that represents our percent confidence that the network is currently part of an actively used VPN service. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.IsAnonymous
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to any sort of anonymous network. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.IsAnonymousVpn
member.summary: This is true if the IP address is registered to an anonymous VPN provider. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.
member.remarks: If a VPN provider does not register subnets under names associated with them, we will likely only flag their IP ranges using the IsHostingProvider property.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.IsHostingProvider
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to a hosting or VPN provider (see description of IsAnonymousVpn property). This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.IsPublicProxy
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to a public proxy. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.IsResidentialProxy
member.summary: This is true if the IP address is on a suspected anonymizing network and belongs to a residential ISP. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.IsTorExitNode
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to a Tor exit node. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.ProviderName
member.summary: The name of the VPN provider (e.g., NordVPN, SurfShark) associated with the network. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Anonymizer.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.City
member.summary: City-level data associated with an IP address.
member.remarks: Do not use any of the city names as a database or dictionary key. Use the instead.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.City.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.City.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.City.Confidence
member.summary: A value from 0-100 indicating MaxMind's confidence that the city is correct. This value is only set when using the Insights web service or the Enterprise database.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Continent
member.summary: Contains data for the continent record associated with an IP address. Do not use any of the continent names as a database or dictionary key. Use the or instead.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Continent.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Continent.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Continent.Code
member.summary: A two character continent code like "NA" (North America) or "OC" (Oceania).

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country
member.summary: Contains data for the country record associated with an IP address. Do not use any of the country names as a database or dictionary key. Use the or instead.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Boolean,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country.Confidence
member.summary: A value from 0-100 indicating MaxMind's confidence that the country is correct. This value is only set when using the Insights web service or the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country.IsInEuropeanUnion
member.summary: This is true if the country is a member state of the European Union. This is available from all location services and databases.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country.IsoCode
member.summary:
The
two-character ISO 3166-1 alpha code
for the country.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location
member.summary: Contains data for the location record associated with an IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.AccuracyRadius
member.summary: The approximate accuracy radius in kilometers around the latitude and longitude for the IP address. This is the radius where we have a 67% confidence that the device using the IP address resides within the circle centered at the latitude and longitude with the provided radius.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.AverageIncome
member.summary: The average income in US dollars associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.HasCoordinates
member.summary: Determines whether both the Latitude and Longitude have values.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.Latitude
member.summary: The approximate latitude of the location associated with the IP address. This value is not precise and should not be used to identify a particular address or household.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.Longitude
member.summary: The approximate longitude of the location associated with the IP address. This value is not precise and should not be used to identify a particular address or household.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.MetroCode
member.summary: The metro code is a no-longer-maintained code for targeting advertisements in Google.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.PopulationDensity
member.summary: The estimated number of people per square kilometer.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.TimeZone
member.summary:
The time zone associated with location, as specified by the
IANA Time Zone Database
, e.g., "America/New_York".

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Location.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.MaxMind
member.summary: Contains data related to your MaxMind account.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.MaxMind.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.MaxMind.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.MaxMind.QueriesRemaining
member.summary: The number of remaining queries in your account for the web service end point. This will be null when using a local database.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.MaxMind.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity
member.summary: Abstract class for records with name maps.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity.Names
member.summary:
A from locale codes to the name in that locale. Don't use any of these names as a database or dictionary key. Use the
or relevant code instead.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity.GeoNameId
member.summary: The GeoName ID for the city.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity.Locales
member.summary: Gets or sets the locales specified by the user.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity.Name
member.summary:
The name of the city based on the locales list passed to the constructor. Don't use any of these names as a database or dictionary key. Use the
or relevant code instead.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.NamedEntity.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Postal
member.summary: Contains data for the postal record associated with an IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Postal.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Postal.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Postal.Code
member.summary: The postal code of the location. Postal codes are not available for all countries. In some countries, this will only contain part of the postal code.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Postal.Confidence
member.summary: A value from 0-100 indicating MaxMind's confidence that the postal code is correct. This value is only set when using the Insights web service or the Enterprise database.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Postal.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.RepresentedCountry
member.summary: Contains data for the represented country associated with an IP address. This class contains the country-level data associated with an IP address for the IP's represented country. The represented country is the country represented by something like a military base. Do not use any of the country names as a database or dictionary key. Use the or instead.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.RepresentedCountry.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.RepresentedCountry.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Boolean,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.RepresentedCountry.Type
member.summary: A string indicating the type of entity that is representing the country. Currently we only return military but this could expand to include other types in the future.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Subdivision
member.summary: Contains data for the subdivisions associated with an IP address. Do not use any of the subdivision names as a database or dictionary key. Use the or instead.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Subdivision.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Subdivision.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Subdivision.Confidence
member.summary: This is a value from 0-100 indicating MaxMind's confidence that the subdivision is correct. This value is only set when using the Insights web service or the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Subdivision.IsoCode
member.summary:
This is a string up to three characters long contain the subdivision portion of the
ISO 3166-2 code
.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits
member.summary: Contains data for the traits record associated with an IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor
Constructor
Constructor for binary compatibility.
Constructor for binary compatibility.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.AutonomousSystemNumber
member.summary:
The
autonomous system number
associated with the IP address. This value is only available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.AutonomousSystemOrganization
member.summary:
The organization associated with the registered
autonomous system number
for the IP address. This value is only available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.ConnectionType
member.summary: The connection type may take the following values: "Dialup", "Cable/DSL", "Corporate", "Cellular", and "Satellite". Additional values may be added in the future. This value is only available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.Domain
member.summary: The second level domain associated with the IP address. This will be something like "example.com" or "example.co.uk", not "foo.example.com". This value is only available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IPAddress
member.summary: The IP address that the data in the model is for. If you performed a "me" lookup against the web service, this will be the externally routable IP address for the system the code is running on. If the system is behind a NAT, this may differ from the IP address locally assigned to it.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IpRiskSnapshot
member.summary: A risk score associated with the IP address, ranging from 0.01 to 99. A higher score indicates a higher risk. Please note that the IP risk score provided in GeoIP products and services is more static than the IP risk score provided in minFraud and is not responsive to traffic on your network. If you need realtime IP risk scoring based on behavioral signals on your own network, please use minFraud. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsAnonymous
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to any sort of anonymous network. This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsAnonymousProxy
member.summary: This is true if the IP is an anonymous proxy.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsAnycast
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to an anycast network. This is not available from GeoLite databases or web services.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsAnonymousVpn
member.summary: This is true if the IP address is registered to an anonymous VPN provider. This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.
member.remarks: If a VPN provider does not register subnets under names associated with them, we will likely only flag their IP ranges using the IsHostingProvider property.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsHostingProvider
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to a hosting or VPN provider (see description of IsAnonymousVpn property). This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsLegitimateProxy
member.summary: True if MaxMind believes this IP address to be a legitimate proxy, such as an internal VPN used by a corporation. This is only available in the GeoIP2 Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsPublicProxy
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to a public proxy. This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsResidentialProxy
member.summary: This is true if the IP address is on a suspected anonymizing network and belongs to a residential ISP. This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsSatelliteProvider
member.summary: This is true if the IP belong to a satellite Internet provider.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.IsTorExitNode
member.summary: This is true if the IP address belongs to a Tor exit node. This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.Isp
member.summary: The name of the ISP associated with the IP address. This value is available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.MobileCountryCode
member.summary: The mobile country code (MCC) associated with the IP address and ISP. This value is available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the GeoIP2 Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.MobileNetworkCode
member.summary: The mobile network code (MNC) associated with the IP address and ISP. This value is available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the GeoIP2 Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.Network
member.summary: The network associated with the record. In particular, this is the largest network where all of the fields besides IPAddress have the same value.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.Organization
member.summary: The name of the organization associated with the IP address. This value is only available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.StaticIPScore
member.summary: An indicator of how static or dynamic an IP address is. The value ranges from 0 to 99.99 with higher values meaning a greater static association. For example, many IP addresses with a UserType of cellular have a lifetime under one. Static Cable/DSL IPs typically have a lifetime above thirty.
member.remark: This indicator can be useful for deciding whether an IP address represents the same user over time.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.UserCount
member.summary: The estimated number of users sharing the IP/network during the past 24 hours. For IPv4, the count is for the individual IP. For IPv6, the count is for the /64 network. This value is only available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.UserType
member.summary:
The user type associated with the IP address. This can be one of the following values:
business
cafe
cellular
college
consumer_privacy_network
content_delivery_network
dialup
government
hosting
library
military
residential
router
school
search_engine_spider
traveler
This value is only available from the City Plus and Insights web services and the Enterprise database.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.WebServiceError
member.summary: Contains data about an error that occurred while calling the web service

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.WebServiceError.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets the error.
member.value: The error message returned by the service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.WebServiceError.Code
member.summary: Gets or sets the code.
member.value: The error code returned by the service.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse
member.summary: Abstract class that city-level response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.City
member.summary: Gets the city for the requested IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.Location
member.summary: Gets the location for the requested IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.Postal
member.summary: Gets the postal object for the requested IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.Subdivisions
member.summary: An of objects representing the country subdivisions for the requested IP address. The number and type of subdivisions varies by country, but a subdivision is typically a state, province, county, etc. Subdivisions are ordered from most general (largest) to most specific (smallest). If the response did not contain any subdivisions, this method returns an empty array.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.MostSpecificSubdivision
member.summary: An object representing the most specific subdivision returned. If the response did not contain any subdivisions, this method returns an empty object.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCityResponse.SetLocales(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Sets the locales on all the NamedEntity properties.
member.param: The locales specified by the user.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse
member.summary: Abstract class for country-level response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.#ctor(MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Continent,MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country,MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.MaxMind,MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Country,MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.RepresentedCountry,MaxMind.GeoIP2.Model.Traits)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.Continent
member.summary: Gets the continent for the requested IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.Country
member.summary: Gets the country for the requested IP address. This object represents the country where MaxMind believes the end user is located

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.MaxMind
member.summary: Gets the MaxMind record containing data related to your account

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.RegisteredCountry
member.summary: Registered country record for the requested IP address. This record represents the country where the ISP has registered a given IP block and may differ from the user's country.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.RepresentedCountry
member.summary: Represented country record for the requested IP address. The represented country is used for things like military bases or embassies. It is only present when the represented country differs from the country.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.Traits
member.summary: Gets the traits for the requested IP address.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents this instance.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractCountryResponse.SetLocales(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Sets the locales on all the NamedEntity properties.
member.param: The locales specified by the user.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractResponse
member.summary: Abstract class that represents a generic response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AbstractResponse.SetLocales(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: This is simplify the database API. Also, we may need to use the locales in the future.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse
member.summary: This class represents the GeoIP2 Anonymous IP response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Construct AnonymousIPResponse model

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,MaxMind.Db.Network)
member.summary: Construct AnonymousIPResponse model

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IsAnonymous
member.summary: Returns true if the IP address belongs to any sort of anonymous network.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IsAnonymousVpn
member.summary: Returns true if the IP address is registered to an anonymous VPN provider.
member.remarks: If a VPN provider does not register subnets under names associated with them, we will likely only flag their IP ranges using the IsHostingProvider property.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IsHostingProvider
member.summary: Returns true if the IP address belongs to a hosting or VPN provider (see description of IsAnonymousVpn property).

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IsPublicProxy
member.summary: Returns true if the IP address belongs to a public proxy.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IsResidentialProxy
member.summary: This is true if the IP address is on a suspected anonymizing network and belongs to a residential ISP.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IsTorExitNode
member.summary: Returns true if IP is a Tor exit node.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.IPAddress
member.summary: The IP address that the data in the model is for. If you performed a "me" lookup against the web service, this will be the externally routable IP address for the system the code is running on. If the system is behind a NAT, this may differ from the IP address locally assigned to it.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousIPResponse.Network
member.summary: The network associated with the record. In particular, this is the largest network where all of the fields besides IPAddress have the same value.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousPlusResponse
member.summary: This class represents the GeoIP Anonymous Plus response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousPlusResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Construct AnonymousPlusResponse model

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousPlusResponse.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,MaxMind.Db.Network,System.String)
member.summary: Construct AnonymousPlusResponse model

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousPlusResponse.AnonymizerConfidence
member.summary: A score ranging from 1 to 99 that is our percent confidence that the network is currently part of an actively used VPN service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AnonymousPlusResponse.ProviderName
member.summary: The name of the VPN provider (e.g., NordVPN, SurfShark, etc.) associated with the network.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse
member.summary: This class represents the GeoLite2 ASN response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.String,System.String,MaxMind.Db.Network)
member.summary: This class represents the GeoLite2 ASN response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Construct an AsnResponse model.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse.AutonomousSystemNumber
member.summary:
The
autonomous system number
associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse.AutonomousSystemOrganization
member.summary:
The organization associated with the registered
autonomous system number
for the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse.IPAddress
member.summary: The IP address that the data in the model is for. If you performed a "me" lookup against the web service, this will be the externally routable IP address for the system the code is running on. If the system is behind a NAT, this may differ from the IP address locally assigned to it.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.AsnResponse.Network
member.summary: The network associated with the record. In particular, this is the largest network where all of the fields besides IPAddress have the same value.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.CityResponse
member.summary: This class provides a model for data returned from the GeoIP2 City database and the GeoIP2 City Plus web services.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.CityResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor
Constructor

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.ConnectionTypeResponse
member.summary: This class represents the GeoIP2 Connection-Type response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.ConnectionTypeResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Construct ConnectionTypeResponse model

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.ConnectionTypeResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String,MaxMind.Db.Network)
member.summary: Construct ConnectionTypeResponse model

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.ConnectionTypeResponse.ConnectionType
member.summary: The connection type may take the following values: "Dialup", "Cable/DSL", "Corporate", "Cellular", and "Satellite". Additional values may be added in the future.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.ConnectionTypeResponse.IPAddress
member.summary: The IP address that the data in the model is for. If you performed a "me" lookup against the web service, this will be the externally routable IP address for the system the code is running on. If the system is behind a NAT, this may differ from the IP address locally assigned to it.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.ConnectionTypeResponse.Network
member.summary: The network associated with the record. In particular, this is the largest network where all of the fields besides IPAddress have the same value.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.CountryResponse
member.summary: This class provides a model for the data returned from the GeoIP2 Country database and the GeoIP2 Country web service.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.CountryResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.summary: Constructor

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.DomainResponse
member.summary: This class represents the GeoIP2 Domain response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.DomainResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String,MaxMind.Db.Network)
member.summary: This class represents the GeoIP2 Domain response.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.DomainResponse.#ctor
member.summary: Construct a DomainResponse model object.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.DomainResponse.Domain
member.summary: The second level domain associated with the IP address. This will be something like "example.com" or "example.co.uk", not "foo.example.com".

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.DomainResponse.IPAddress
member.summary: The IP address that the data in the model is for. If you performed a "me" lookup against the web service, this will be the externally routable IP address for the system the code is running on. If the system is behind a NAT, this may differ from the IP address locally assigned to it.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.DomainResponse.Network
member.summary: The network associated with the record. In particular, this is the largest network where all of the fields besides IPAddress have the same value.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.EnterpriseResponse
member.summary: This class provides a model for the data returned by the GeoIP2 Enterprise database.
This class provides a model for the data returned by the GeoIP2 Enterprise database.

Constructor
Constructor for backward compatibility

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.InsightsResponse.Anonymizer
member.summary: Gets anonymizer-related data for the requested IP address. This is available from the GeoIP2 Insights web service.

member.name: T:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.AutonomousSystemNumber
member.summary:
The
autonomous system number
associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.AutonomousSystemOrganization
member.summary:
The organization associated with the registered
autonomous system number
for the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.Isp
member.summary: The name of the ISP associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.MobileCountryCode
member.summary: The mobile country code (MCC) associated with the IP address and ISP.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.MobileNetworkCode
member.summary: The mobile network code (MNC) associated with the IP address and ISP.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.Organization
member.summary: The name of the organization associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.IPAddress
member.summary: The IP address that the data in the model is for. If you performed a "me" lookup against the web service, this will be the externally routable IP address for the system the code is running on. If the system is behind a NAT, this may differ from the IP address locally assigned to it.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.Responses.IspResponse.Network
member.summary: The network associated with the record. In particular, this is the largest network where all of the fields besides IPAddress have the same value.

summary.para: This class provides a client API for all the GeoIP2 web services. The services are Country, City Plus, and Insights. Each service returns a different set of data about an IP address, with Country returning the least data and Insights the most.
Each service is represented by a different model class which contains data about the IP address.
If the service does not return a particular piece of data for an IP address, the associated property is not populated.
The service may not return any information for an entire record, in which case all of the properties for that model class will be empty.

The basic API for this class is the same for all of the services. First you create a WebServiceClient with your MaxMind accountId and licenseKey, then you call the method corresponding to a specific service, passing it the IP address you want to look up.
If the request succeeds, the method call will return a model class for the service you called. This model in turn contains multiple record classes, each of which represents part of the data returned.
If the request fails, the client class throws an exception.
For details on the possible errors returned by the web service itself, see the GeoIP2 web service documentation.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClientOptions})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Net.Http.HttpMessageHandler)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of locale codes to use in name property from most preferred to least preferred.

The host to use when accessing the service. Set this to "geolite.info" to use the GeoLite2 web service instead of GeoIP2. Set this to "sandbox.maxmind.com" to use the Sandbox GeoIP2 web service instead of the production GeoIP2 web service. The sandbox allows you to experiment with the API without affecting your production data.
Timeout in milliseconds for connection to web service. The default is 3000.
Use HTTP instead of HTTPS. Note that MaxMind servers require HTTPS.
The HttpMessageHandler to use when creating the HttpClient. The handler will be disposed.

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.CountryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the Country web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Country response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.CountryAsync(System.Net.IPAddress)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the Country web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Country response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.CountryAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously query the Country web service for the requesting IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Country response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.CityAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the City Plus web service for the specified IP address.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the City Plus response

member.name: M:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClient.InsightsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously query the Insights web service for the specified IP address. Please note that only the GeoIP2 web services support Insights. The GeoLite2 web services do not support it.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Insights response

member.summary: Asynchronously query the Insights web service for the specified IP address. Please note that only the GeoIP2 web services support Insights. The GeoLite2 web services do not support it.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Insights response

member.summary: Asynchronously query the Insights web service for the requesting IP address. Please note that only the GeoIP2 web services support Insights. The GeoLite2 web services do not support it.
member.returns: Task that produces an object modeling the Insights response

member.summary: Options class for WebServiceClient.

member.summary: Your MaxMind account ID.

member.summary: Your MaxMind license key.

member.summary: List of locale codes to use in name property from most preferred to least preferred.

member.summary: Timeout in milliseconds for connection to web service. The default is 3000.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClientOptions.Host
member.summary: The host to use when accessing the service.

member.name: P:MaxMind.GeoIP2.WebServiceClientOptions.DisableHttps
member.summary: If set, the client will use HTTP instead of HTTPS. Please note that MaxMind servers require HTTPS.
